recentArticles.title: 'Michael' Review: Jaafar Jackson in Solid Michael Jackson Bio-Drama - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: ### Michael Jackson Biopic 'Michael': First Reactions](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/michael-jackson-biopic-first-reactions-1236570185/). Those and other signs of Jackson’s enduring popularity suggest that diehard fans of his music — some of us used to wait hours for “Billie Jean” to come around again on MTV — will still seize the opportunity to celebrate the legendary streak that took him from childhood Motown stardom to pop royalty, with the three certified banger albums produced by Quincy Jones, *Off the Wall*, *Thriller* and *Bad*. What makes all this compelling is the degree to which Jaafar Jackson, the son of Michael’s older brother Jermaine, disappears into the role of his celebrated uncle. Even more than a decade later, when Michael’s solo stardom had far eclipsed that of his work with his brothers — let alone his earning power — Joe remained a controlling bully, insisting that his most famous son continue touring with the Jacksons, as they became known when Jermaine left to pursue a solo career with Motown.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ review: Michael Jackson biopic is painfully bad - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ review: Michael Jackson biopic is painfully bad. How flabbergasting to see “Michael,” the new biopic about Michael Jackson, the best-selling solo artist of all time, crash and burn into such a cheap and embarrassing bore. Say what you will about Michael Jackson — and God knows there is plenty to say — he was not boring. In almost every moment of “Michael,” the King of Pop, played with panache and detail by his nephew Jaafar Jackson, is flashing a megawatt grin when he’s not staring longingly at his copy of “Peter Pan.” This Michael is perfect. That’s right — there is a scene in which Michael Jackson and Bubbles the chimp play Twister, underscored by “Blame It on the Boogie.”. In every sense, this is “Attorneys Present: The Michael Jackson Story.”. Jaafar Jackson plays his uncle Michael Jackson in "Michael." ©Lions Gate/Courtesy Everett Collection.

recentArticles.title: EXCLUSIVE: Complex Is Scaling Its Food Festival Family Style Into a Year-Round Media Brand - ADWEEK
recentArticles.snippet: ### Media News. # EXCLUSIVE: Complex Is Scaling Its Food Festival Family Style Into a Year-Round Media Brand. ## The streetwear brand is launching a slate of original programming for the brand while expanding its event footprint, projecting $20 million in revenue. Nearly two years after acquiring the food festival Family Style in May 2024, Complex is turning the brand into a full-fledged food media franchise. Now, the brand is extending into a year-round content operation, Complex chief executive Aaron Levant told ADWEEK. On Wednesday, the streetwear brand launched a dedicated YouTube channel for Family Style with four original series, an expansion that marks the most aggressive push into food from Complex since it was acquired by NTWRK in February 2024. Mark Stenberg is ADWEEK's senior media reporter. ## Media. #### YouTuber Jesser Launches Parent Company, Preps Business Expansion. The media company, which generates an eight-figure revenue, has content and product debuts coming later this year.

recentArticles.title: Taemin Is Ready to Make an Even Bigger Impact During Coachella Weekend Two - WWD
recentArticles.snippet: # Taemin Is Ready to Make an Even Bigger Impact During Coachella Weekend Two. The "Idol's Idol" is making history at the festival, bringing his most popular hits to the stage along with six new songs. Known as the “Idol’s Idol,” Taemin has established his legacy through strong stage performances and choreography, both as a solo artist and with second-generation K-pop group SHINee. This spring, he’s claimed a few “firsts” — he’s the first Korean solo male K-pop artist to be featured on the Coachella lineup, and the first to have a dedicated exhibition at the Grammy Museum. “ I want them to see the type of musician I am through the performances, the music and the way I’m expressing everything,” he says. “Justin Bieber performed on the same night that I did, and I really wanted to see his concert,” he says. “ As always, I think it’s gonna be very fun, as it always has been,” he says of performing with the group, which debuted in 2008.

recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West Postpones Marseille Concert In Face Of Potential French Government Ban. Kanye West has postponed a concert in the French port city of Marseille in June following news that France was studying options for banning the event due to his past antisemitic outbursts and pro-Nazi declarations. ### Kanye West: French Interior Minister Studying Options To Stop Marseille Concert](https://deadline.com/2026/04/kanye-west-french-interior-minister-ban-marseille-concert-1236860399/). ### Wireless Festival Canceled After Kanye West Blocked From Entering UK](https://deadline.com/2026/04/kanye-west-wireless-headline-controversy-antisemitic-remarks-1236783288/). West had been due to perform on June 11 at the Vélodrome stadium in Marseille, but news broke on Tuesday that French Interior Minister Laurent Nuñez was studying ways “all possibilities” to stop the concert. Back in the U.S., West’s first live performances in five years at the SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles in early April drew between 60,000 to 80,000 people a night and reportedly earned $33M between them, leaving music and concert organizer execs in a conundrum over how to move on next with the artist.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Reveals Features on Self-Titled Album: Cardi B, Clipse, Usher, Lil Wayne, Missy Elliott & More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Reveals Features on Self-Titled Album: Cardi B, Clipse, Usher, Lil Wayne, Missy Elliott & More. Ahead of Kehlani’s self-titled album’s arrival later this week, the Bay Area native revealed the decorated guests she’s recruited for collaborations on the project. The all-star lineup includes Missy Elliott, who appeared on Kehlani’s “Back and Forth” single, as well as Cardi B, Usher, Brandy, Clipse, Lil Wayne, Big Sean, Leon Thomas, Lil Jon and T-Pain. After notching her first Billboard Hot 100 top 10 hit with “Folded,” Kehlani is set to be honored with *Billboard*‘s Women In Music Impact award later this month. As far as goals for the eponymous LP, Kehlani hopes to perform with an orchestra at Manhattan’s famed Carnegie Hall and wants to see various tracks get placements in movies. “I want to do this album at Carnegie Hall with an orchestra,” she added. *Kehlani* will serve as the R&B singer’s fifth album. recentArticles.snippet: ## The decision by Ye came a week after he was banned from entering the U.K. for a music festival. The rapper formerly known as Kanye West postponed his upcoming show in the city of Marseille after French authorities said they would seek to ban the concert. The decision by Ye came a week after he was banned from entering the U.K., where he was scheduled to headline the Wireless Festival in July, following a backlash over the artist’s history of antisemitic remarks. Kanye West, who now goes by Ye, took out a full-page paid ad in the Jan. 26 issue of The Wall Street Journal to apologize for his years of antisemitic outbursts, attributing his behavior to an undiagnosed brain injury and mental health issues. & WORLD NEWS   VIDEO   INVESTIGATIONS   BETTER GET BAQUERO   SUBMIT A TIP   TV LISTINGS / NBC SCHEDULE   ENTERTAINMENT   NEW YORK LIVE   1ST LOOK   GEORGE TO THE RESCUE   OPEN HOUSE   SPORTS   COMMUNITY.

recentArticles.title: Kanye West Postpones Marseille Concert After France Considers Banning Him From Entry - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # Kanye West Postpones Marseille Concert After France Considers Banning Him From Entry. Ye, the artist formerly known as Kanye West, took to X on Tuesday night to announce that he has postponed his upcoming concert in Marseille, after the office of French Interior Minister Laurent Nuñez confirmed it was exploring paths to ban him from performing in France’s oldest city. “After much thought and consideration, it is my sole decision to postpone my show in Marseille, France until further notice,” West wrote. Benoit Payan, the mayor of Marseille, also took a stand against West in an X post on March 4. While the threat was enough to get the 24-time Grammy winner to indefinitely push his show, actually banning West from performing in Marseille may have proved difficult. * ### Sean Baker’s ‘Anora’ Follow-Up ‘Ti Amo!’ Set at New Warner Bros. * ### ‘Marty Supreme’ Star Kevin O’Leary Defends Timothée Chalamet Amid Ballet and Opera Controversy: ‘He Took a Bum Rap on That’.

recentArticles.title: New Prince Single “With This Tear” Released Ahead of Vault Project: Stream - consequence.net
recentArticles.snippet: # New Prince Single “With This Tear” Released Ahead of Vault Project: Stream. The song is newly mixed and mastered by Grammy-nominated engineer and producer Chris James, who worked on Prince’s *HITnRUN Phase Two*, *Art Official Age*, and *Plectrumelectrum*. A new Prince recording, “With This Tear,” has been released from the artist’s legendarily filled musical vault through his NPG Records and Legacy Recordings. The single is the first release from a series of previously unreleased recordings leading up to a new vault album, according to Prince’s estate. “With This Tear” was put out a day before the 10th anniversary of Prince’s death and events at the musician’s famous estate and recording studio, Paisley Park, outside of Minneapolis. After writing the song, Prince offered it to singer Celine Dion, who recorded a version and released it on her 1992 self-titled album. ### Kacey Musgraves Releases New Song "Middle of Nowhere" Just Ahead of Coachella Performance: Stream. ### Boards of Canada Release First New Song in 13 Years: Stream.

recentArticles.title: Jackson legacy on the line as ‘Michael’ biopic divides the family once more - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Jackson legacy on the line as ‘Michael’ biopic divides the family once more. “In what should be a great time for this family, a time when everyone really gets a chance to not only rally around [ailing family matriarch] Katherine and the memory of Michael, but to celebrate Jaafar, there is still division,” a family source told The Post. On one side, three of the Jackson 5 family band which launched Michael’s career: Jermaine, 71, Jackie, 74, and Marlon, 69, who all returned to Gary, their hometown, this week joined by their children and a packed crowd for the premiere. On the other side stand Randy and Janet Jackson, Michael’s closest siblings in age. Long considered the outlier in the family, Randy’s strained relations are partly rooted in one of the most personal betrayals in Jackson family history — when Jermaine married Alejandra Oaziaza, the mother of two of Randy’s children, Steven and Genevieve, in 1995. “There’s never been a doubt that the Jackson cousins have been closer than the Jackson siblings,” a source said.

recentArticles.title: Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown wins top honor for his...interviews? - Celtics Wire
recentArticles.snippet: Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown wins top honor for his...interviews? # Boston Celtics star Jaylen Brown wins top honor for his...interviews? Jaylen Brown has made a name for himself in NBA media circles for his thoughtful, and at times, unguarded answers about a variety of topics both on and off the court since joining the league in 2016. Brown was honored with a nod for the organization of journalists covering the sport for their First Team All-Interview. According to the PBWA, the designation, "which honors the players who are consistently thoughtful, insightful and engaging with the media," saw the Cal alum come in fifth overall in votes among those participating in the voting. San Antonio Spurs star Victor Wembanyama and Golden State Warriors legend Stephen Curry were the top two vote-getters, along with the rest of the First Team, Kevin Durant of the Houston Rockets, Donovan Mitchell of the Cleveland Cavaliers, and Brown.

recentArticles.title: Boys Volleyball Dominates Burlingame in Short Game - M-A Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: Senior defensive specialist Jaden Clark took the service line and delivered a series of clean serves that forced the Panthers into an early timeout with the Bears leading 3-0. Adding on, junior setter Coen Chou wasted no time finding momentum, setting up senior outside hitter Ben Warner\* for a sharp hit on the line to extend the lead to 5-0. Sandoval continued to anchor the back row, while a series of blocks at the net by Cunningham and Warner forced the Panthers into faults, extending the lead to 19-9. Chou set up Warner for another shocker of a hit to reach 13-7, where Warner remained a force at the net, nailing a hit into the side of the court to further extend the lead to 15-8. Robbins fired a hit into a gap in the Panthers’ defense to reach match point, and a final block by Chou and Cunningham ended the set 25-11, concluding a three-set victory for M-A.

recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber Coachella Debate Rages Over One Question: Was His Set Perfectly Minimal or Not Enough? - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: One of those people was *Billboard*‘s own Lyndsey Havens, who, in her recap of the performance, praised Bieber for managing “to make a polo field of strangers feel like a late-night hang among close friends.” While some concertgoers and YouTube stream watchers similarly praised the set’s minimalist aesthetic — a lo-fi feel that definitely matched Bieber’s pair of 2025 albums *SWAG* and *SWAG II* — others compared the performance to JB’s fellow 2026 headliner Sabrina Carpenter or even Beyoncé’s famous 2018 Beychella set and wondered how he got away with doing so little on the biggest festival stage in the U.S. On the new *Billboard Pop Shop Podcast*, Katie & Keith are discussing the active debate — as well as the sea of special guests (Jennifer Lopez! Casual pop fans and chart junkies can hear*Billboard*‘s executive digital director, West Coast, Katie Atkinson and*Billboard*’s managing director, charts and data operations, Keith Caulfield every week on the podcast, which can be streamed on Billboard.com or**downloaded in Apple**Podcasts or your favorite podcast provider.
recentArticles.summary: Justin Bieber Coachella Debate Rages Over One Question: Was His Set Perfectly Minimal or Not Enough? - Billboard

recentArticles.title: Billie Eilish Drops New ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ Film Trailer - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Billie Eilish Drops New ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ Film Trailer. The 10-time Grammy-, two-time Oscar-winning singer dropped a new trailer for her upcoming concert film *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D)* on Monday (April 13). The new three-minute-long trailer follows Eilish and three-time Oscar winner James Cameron as Eilish gets ready to perform for thousands of fans and Cameron prepares to capture the moment. On top of getting a look at how Cameron and Eilish filmed the singer’s concert, fans also get behind-the-scenes looks at how Eilish gets ready for a sold-out performance in the trailer. Her songs, including the Billboard Hot 100 No. 1 hit “Bad Guy” and “Chihiro,” are played over moments of Eilish on- and offstage as the words “Prepare for her vision / her words / her world” flash on the screen. *Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D),* co-directed by Cameron and Eilish, hits theaters on May 8.
recentArticles.summary: Billie Eilish Drops New ‘Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour’ Film Trailer - Billboard

recentArticles.title: Kehlani On 'Folded,' Staying True To Her Moral Compass and More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Around the same time, Kehlani dropped “Folded,” the throwback slow jam that slowly grew into the biggest hit of her career, reaching No. 6 on the Billboard Hot 100 (her first top 10 on the chart) and eventually winning Grammys for best R&B song and best R&B performance. “You could think this is the furthest I’m ever going to go and this is the biggest it’s ever going to get,” says this year’s Women in Music Impact honoree, “and then God just surprises you and says, ‘No, I thought bigger for you always.’ ”. I really want some of these songs to make it into movies … and ultimately just have a really historical personal moment for me, and hopefully keep adding to the genre because that’s the coolest thing that “Folded” has done beyond anything — I’m watching the conversation change and I’m a part of it.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要報導歌手Kehlani的歌曲成就與事業發展。

recentArticles.snippet: Music|Kendrick Lamar’s Protégé Baby Keem Tells the Whole Story, Warts and All. https://www.nytimes.com/2026/04/16/arts/music/baby-keem-casino.html. When we have confirmed access, the full article content will load. # Kendrick Lamar’s Protégé Baby Keem Tells the Whole Story, Warts and All. The 25-year-old rapper and producer knows he’s benefited from his cousin’s support. # Kendrick Lamar’s Protégé Baby Keem Tells the Whole Story, Warts and All. The 25-year-old rapper and producer knows he’s benefited from his cousin’s support. Coming of age in Las Vegas, he had “never seen a hotel without cigarettes.” His mother smoked inside the family’s apartment and on his latest album, “Casino,” the 25-year-old rapper and producer who goes by Baby Keem likens it to living in a haunted house. Keem first emerged as a teenager in 2019 with the piquant self-produced hit “Orange Soda,” and has been a rising star, if a hazy one. “There’s curiosity to my story,” Keem said.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Kendrick Lamar的門生Baby Keem的個人故事與新專輯，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Dave Chappelle stands firm through backlash and considers revisiting ‘Chappelle’s Show’ - Greenwich Time
recentArticles.snippet: “I’ve had a lot of support from my people,” said Chappelle, an Emmy and Grammy winner. “Sometimes people will attach things to your voice that don’t necessarily have anything to do with you,” he said. Even as he reflects on his own career, Chappelle said he’s paying close attention to the next generation of comedians. “I love what he does,” Chappelle said before drawing a distinction between digital success and stand-up. “One of the worst things that can happen to a comedian is becoming successful before they get good,” Chappelle said. Chappelle remains active onstage, including upcoming performances tied to the Netflix Is a Joke Fest in Los Angeles in May. Back home, he continues to perform at his own comedy club — which used to be a firehouse — in Yellow Springs, where he has hosted surprise sets and brought in high-profile guests, including Travis Scott, Lizzo, Wyclef Jean, Marsha Ambrosius, Clipse, 50 Cent and Christopher Cross.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於喜劇演員Dave Chappelle的職業生涯與近期活動，並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed - WXXI News
recentArticles.snippet: # Sitting in a jail cell, alone and hopeless, a man's life is suddenly changed. When Jay was 22 years old, he was a self-described loner. And so I started making poor decisions," Jay said. "The next night I made a plan of how to do it, and I did it," Jay remembered. Jay made a plan to end his life. Jay had grown up religious, but had stopped going to church years before. He said yes, and listened as the man began to pray. "I wish I could tell you that I remember the [exact] words that he said to me, but what I remember is that his words landed with me, and instead of wanting my life to be over, suddenly I saw hope," Jay said. The interaction happened nearly ten years ago, but it was a pivotal moment in Jay's life, and one he thinks about all the time. Jay says that he wishes he could meet that man again and express his appreciation.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導中的「Jay」並非指華語歌手周杰倫，而是講述一位同名男子在獄中經歷絕望後重獲希望的故事。
